info.title: MoneyExchangeTHGroup Admin API
info.description:
RESTful API for the MoneyExchangeTHGroup Admin Panel. Manages currencies, exchange rates, members, bookings, wallet top-ups, articles, and admin profiles.

All endpoints (except `GET /api/currencies` and `GET /api/articles?public=true`) require authentication via Supabase session cookies.

tags.name: Exchange Rates
tags.description: Live exchange rates from freecurrencyapi.com with 1-hour cache

tags.name: Branches
tags.description: Branch management and per-branch margin overrides

post.description: Authenticate with email and password. Sets Supabase session cookies on success.
Sign out and clear session cookies.

get.description: Returns all currencies sorted by code. **Public endpoint** — no authentication required.

post.description: Create a new currency entry. Requires authentication.

get.description: Retrieve a currency by its ISO code.

patch.description: Partial update of a currency. Accepts both snake_case and camelCase field names.

delete.description: Remove a currency by its ISO code.

get.description: Fetches exchange rates from freecurrencyapi.com with THB as base currency. Rates are cached for 1 hour in the `exchange_rate_cache` table. On fresh fetch, automatically updates `buy_rate` and `sell_rate` for all currencies in the database using their margin percentages.

rates.description: Currency code → rate mapping (units per 1 THB)

source.description: `cache` if served from DB cache, `api` if freshly fetched

get.description: Returns all branches sorted by name. **Public endpoint** — no authentication required.

post.description: Create a new branch entry. Requires authentication.

delete.description: Remove a branch. Also deletes all branch-specific margin overrides.

get.description: Returns all currencies with their effective margins for this branch. Each entry indicates whether the margin is a branch-specific override or the global default.

put.description: Bulk upsert margin overrides for a branch. All currencies in the array will be set/updated.

patch.summary: Update single currency margin for branch
patch.description: Upsert a margin override for a single currency at this branch.

get.description: Returns all articles, optionally filtered by status. Use `?public=true` for public-facing (published only, no auth required).

parameters.name: public
parameters.description: When `true`, returns only published articles (no auth required)

post.description: Create a new article. The `author_id` is set automatically from the authenticated user.

patch.description: Partial update of an article. Accepts both snake_case and camelCase field names. Supports i18n fields with _en and _cn suffixes.

post.description: Upload an image file to the `article-images` Supabase storage bucket. Allowed types: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG. Max size: 5 MB.

file.description: Image file (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG — max 5 MB)

url.description: Public URL of the uploaded image

patch.description: Partial update of a member. Accepts both snake_case and camelCase field names.
Update booking fields — typically used for status transitions and adding notes.
When status is changed to `approved`, the member's wallet balance is automatically increased by the top-up amount.

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated admin user.

patch.description: Partial update of the authenticated admin's profile.

get.description: Returns aggregate counts (currencies, articles, members, bookings, pending bookings, pending top-ups), top 5 currencies, 5 most recent bookings, and 5 most recent top-up requests.

cookieAuth.name: sb-access-token
cookieAuth.description: Supabase session cookie set after login. Automatically managed by the browser.

BranchMarginEntry.description: Merged view of a currency's margin for a specific branch, showing both the effective margin and global defaults.

buy_margin_percent.description: Effective buy margin (branch override or global)

sell_margin_percent.description: Effective sell margin (branch override or global)

is_override.description: true if this branch has a custom margin for this currency

global_buy_margin.description: Global default buy margin from currencies table

global_sell_margin.description: Global default sell margin from currencies table

title.example: เคล็ดลับอัตราแลกเปลี่ยน

BadRequest.description: Bad request — validation error or missing fields

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized — not logged in or session expired
